title: ISic001550. I.Sicily inscription 001550
body:
Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa
1Μαρία ἥρυς
2ἀγαθά

Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa
1ΜΑΡΙΑΗΡΥΣ
2ΑΓΑΘΑ

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

Text of IGPalermo

translation

commentary

bibliography

  • 34.0950 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • 04.0042 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • Kretschmer 1927 306 no.3 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002533
  • Gabrici 1929 50-53 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001976
  • Bisi 1970 98 no.2 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002148
  • Manni Piraino 1973 20 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000531
  • Di Stefano 1984 166-169 no.186 fig.90 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002035
  • Vento 2000 71-75 tav.28-36 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001525

painted letters, simple in style without serifs and not perfectly following a horizontal line. Alpha has straight bar; theta is circular with a central point; M is very broad, all strokes diagonal, the mid-point not fully down to the lower line; sigma is lunate.

Line 1 Interlineation line 1 to 2
